helpers.title: Helper Functions
helpers.description: Utility functions for common development tasks

stringHelper.title: String Helper
stringHelper.description: String manipulation utilities including formatting, validation, and case conversion. Functions like capitalize, truncate, email validation, URL validation, currency formatting, case conversion (camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case), HTML escaping, and more.

deviceInfo.title: Device Info Helper
deviceInfo.description: Get comprehensive device information including platform details, OS version, screen dimensions, device capabilities, and compatibility checks. Essential for responsive design and feature detection.

validation.title: Validation Helper
validation.description: Input validation utilities for forms and data processing. Includes email validation, URL validation, phone number validation, and custom validation rules for secure data handling.

formatting.title: Formatting Helper
formatting.description: Data formatting utilities for dates, numbers, currency, and text. Includes date formatting, number formatting with decimals, currency formatting, and text transformation functions.

themeSystem.title: Theme System
themeSystem.description: Light/dark theme management and color system

themedComponents.title: Themed Components
themedComponents.description: Components that automatically adapt to theme changes

formComponents.title: Form Components

layoutComponents.title: Layout Components
